briefdescription.para: Prometheus Counter.
Prometheus Gauge.
Prometheus Summary.
Prometheus Histogram.
Prometheus metric types.
Callback used to scrape a collector for a specific metric.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on the collector to scrape
A valid pointer on the metric to scrape
A valid pointer to a user data or NULL

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, otherwise a negative error code.

briefdescription.para: Register a metric with a Prometheus collector.

detaileddescription.para: Registers the specified metric with the given collector.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the collector to register the metric with.
Pointer to the metric to register.

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, otherwise a negative error code.

parameterdescription.para: Invalid arguments.
Not enough memory to register the metric.

briefdescription.para: Get a metric from a Prometheus collector.

detaileddescription.para: Retrieves the metric with the specified name from the given collector.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the collector to retrieve the metric from.
Name of the metric to retrieve.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the retrieved metric, or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Walk through all metrics in a Prometheus collector and format them into a buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the walker context.
Pointer to the buffer to store the formatted metrics.
Size of the buffer.

simplesect.para: 0 if successful and we went through all metrics, -EAGAIN if we need to call this function again, any other negative error code means an error occurred.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the walker context to walk through all metrics.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the walker context.
Pointer to the collector to walk through.

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, otherwise a negative error code.

briefdescription.para: Increment the value of a Prometheus counter metric Increments the value of the specified counter metric by arbitrary amount.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the counter metric to increment.
Amount to increment the counter by.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative errno on error.

briefdescription.para: Increment the value of a Prometheus counter metric Increments the value of the specified counter metric by one.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the counter metric to increment.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative errno on error.

briefdescription.para: Set the counter value to specific value.

detaileddescription.para:
The new value must be higher than the current value. This function can be used if we cannot add individual increments to the counter but need to periodically update the counter value. This function will add the difference between the new value and the old value to the counter.
counter
Pointer to the counter metric to increment.
value
New value of the counter.
0 on success, negative errno on error.

briefdescription.para: Format exposition data for Prometheus.

detaileddescription.para: Formats the exposition data collected by the specified collector into the provided buffer. Function will format metric data according to Prometheus text-based format

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the collector containing the data to format.
Pointer to the buffer where the formatted exposition data will be stored.
Size of the buffer.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative errno on error.

briefdescription.para: Format exposition data for one metric for Prometheus.

detaileddescription.para: Formats the exposition data of one specific metric into the provided buffer. Function will format metric data according to Prometheus text-based format.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the metric containing the data to format.
Pointer to the buffer where the formatted exposition data will be stored.
Size of the buffer.
How many bytes have been written to the buffer.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative errno on error.

briefdescription.para: Set the value of a Prometheus gauge metric.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the value of the specified gauge metric to the given value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the gauge metric to set.
Value to set the gauge metric to.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, -EINVAL if the value is negative.

briefdescription.para: Observe a value in a Prometheus histogram metric.

detaileddescription.para: Observes the specified value in the given histogram metric.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the histogram metric to observe.
Value to observe in the histogram metric.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, -EINVAL if the value is negative.

briefdescription.para: Observes a value in a Prometheus summary metric.

detaileddescription.para: Observes the specified value in the given summary metric.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the summary metric to observe.
Value to observe in the summary metric.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, -EINVAL if the value is negative.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct prometheus_summary *summary, double value, unsigned long count)
memberdef.name: prometheus_summary_observe_set

briefdescription.para: Set the summary value to specific value.

detaileddescription.para:
The new value must be higher than the current value. This function can be used if we cannot add individual increments to the summary but need to periodically update the counter value. This function will add the difference between the new value and the old value to the summary fields.
summary
Pointer to the summary metric to increment.
value
New value of the summary.
count
New counter value of the summary.
0 on success, negative errno on error.

memberdef.name: PROMETHEUS_COLLECTOR_DEFINE
memberdef.initializer: STRUCT_SECTION_ITERABLE(prometheus_collector, _name) = { \ .name = STRINGIFY(_name), \ .metrics = SYS_SLIST_STATIC_INIT(&_name.metrics), \ .lock = Z_MUTEX_INITIALIZER(_name.lock), \ .user_cb = COND_CODE_0( \ NUM_VA_ARGS_LESS_1( \ LIST_DROP_EMPTY(__VA_ARGS__, _)), \ (NULL), \ (GET_ARG_N(1, __VA_ARGS__))), \ .user_data = COND_CODE_0( \ NUM_VA_ARGS_LESS_1(__VA_ARGS__), (NULL), \ (GET_ARG_N(1, \ GET_ARGS_LESS_N(1, __VA_ARGS__)))), \ }

briefdescription.para: Prometheus Collector definition.

parameterdescription.para: The collector's name.

Optional user callback function. If set, this function is called when the collector is scraped. The function should be of type prometheus_scrape_cb_t. Optional user data to pass to the user callback function.

briefdescription.para: Prometheus Counter definition.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines a Counter metric. If you want to make the counter static, then add "static" keyword before the PROMETHEUS_COUNTER_DEFINE.

_name
The counter metric name
_desc
Counter description
_label
Label for the metric. Additional labels can be added at runtime.
_collector
Collector to map this metric. Can be set to NULL if it not yet known.
...
Optional user data specific to this metric instance.
Example usage: PROMETHEUS_COUNTER_DEFINE(http_request_counter,"HTTPrequestcounter", ({.key="http_request",.value="request_count"}), NULL);

briefdescription.para: Prometheus Gauge definition.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines a Gauge metric. If you want to make the gauge static, then add "static" keyword before the PROMETHEUS_GAUGE_DEFINE.

_name
The gauge metric name.
_desc
Gauge description
_label
Label for the metric. Additional labels can be added at runtime.
_collector
Collector to map this metric. Can be set to NULL if it not yet known.
...
Optional user data specific to this metric instance.
Example usage: PROMETHEUS_GAUGE_DEFINE(http_request_gauge,"HTTPrequestgauge", ({.key="http_request",.value="request_count"}), NULL);

briefdescription.para: Prometheus Histogram definition.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines a Histogram metric. If you want to make the histogram static, then add "static" keyword before the PROMETHEUS_HISTOGRAM_DEFINE.

_name
The histogram metric name.
_desc
Histogram description
_label
Label for the metric. Additional labels can be added at runtime.
_collector
Collector to map this metric. Can be set to NULL if it not yet known.
...
Optional user data specific to this metric instance.
Example usage: PROMETHEUS_HISTOGRAM_DEFINE(http_request_histogram,"HTTPrequesthistogram", ({.key="request_latency",.value="request_latency_seconds"}), NULL);

briefdescription.para: Prometheus Summary definition.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines a Summary metric. If you want to make the summary static, then add "static" keyword before the PROMETHEUS_SUMMARY_DEFINE.

_name
The summary metric name.
_desc
Summary description
_label
Label for the metric. Additional labels can be added at runtime.
_collector
Collector to map this metric. Can be set to NULL if it not yet known.
...
Optional user data specific to this metric instance.
Example usage: PROMETHEUS_SUMMARY_DEFINE(http_request_summary,"HTTPrequestsummary", ({.key="request_latency", .value="request_latency_seconds"}),NULL);
